user_prompt: What was our average first-response time last week, broken down by category?
actual_output:
Hi there! 

Currently, I don't have live access to our Zendesk/Intercom or Notion metrics database in this specific chat session to pull the exact numbers for last week. 

If you have the raw data export handy, you can paste it here and I would be happy to analyze it and calculate the average first-response times broken down by category (Billing, Technical, Feature Requests, etc.). 

Alternatively, once my MCP connection to our reporting dashboard is active, I can automatically generate this as part of our weekly support digest. Let me know how you'd like to proceed!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot explains its current technical limitation regarding live data access while offering a clear alternative to fulfill the request if the data is provided.
